events.text: Written to `/app/answer.json`. Since the sole photo of the bonding connection is obstructed by packaging and glare, the identifying mark and termination details can't be verified against NEC 250.104/250.30 — I flagged this as `needs_more_info` (medium risk) rather than pass/fail, with corrective actions to re-photograph and re-inspect before cover-up.
